corrections.current: αὐτοῦ, καὶ ὁ πόλεμος ἔθλιβεν αὐτόν
corrections.correct: αὐτοῦ, ὅτι ὁ πόλεμος ἔθλιβεν αὐτόν
corrections.note: Printed text has ὅτι after comma; transcript omitted it.

notes: Running head and apparatus match the scan. Left-margin numerals 3–14 are line numbers and are correctly not treated as verse text beyond the existing verse numerals in body.
